title: Arcana Publish Pipeline
subtitle: From commit to npm — v0.1.0 partial; v0.1.1 fixed; v0.2.0 FTS+hybrid; v0.2.1 query facades
purpose: Shows the publish path for v0.x. v0.1.0 was partial (workspace:* not rewritten). v0.1.1 corrected via pnpm publish -r. v0.2.0 shipped the FTS+hybrid sprint (minor bump — additive contract methods). v0.2.1 shipped three query-zone kernel facades + defensive FTS5 input cap (patch bump — code-additive only).
publish_order: contracts first (no workspace deps), then core, testkit, provider-libsql, provider-sqlite-vec in any order
publish_status: v1.1.0 live since 2026-05-22; v1.2.0 staged 2026-05-22 (System Health Phase 1 — 8 production-blocker fixes + transaction primitive + latestOnly default + entity normalisation + getNeighbors multi-hop + single-flight guard) — NOT YET PUBLISHED (awaits OTP)

lanes.label: v0.1.0 — Manual publish (PARTIAL — do not rely on)
issues: Used npm publish instead of pnpm publish -r — workspace:* deps were NOT rewritten to real version numbers
arcana-provider-sqlite-vec did not exist yet at time of v0.1.0 attempt

stages.label: bun run lint
stages.note: Script exists; vacuously passes with no packages (--no-error-on-unmatched-pattern)

stages.label: bun run typecheck
stages.note: Script exists; guard skips tsc -b until packages/*/tsconfig.json exists

stages.label: bun run test
stages.note: Vitest passes; 212 tests, 5 packages as of v0.1.1

lanes.label: v0.1.1 — Manual publish (correct approach — pnpm publish -r)

stages.label: pnpm publish -r --filter='./packages/*' --access public
stages.note: All 5 packages live; workspace:* deps rewritten

lanes.label: v0.2.0 — FTS+hybrid sprint publish
lanes.semver_rationale: Minor bump: searchFulltext added to StructuredStore contract, FulltextMatch/FulltextSearchOpts/FulltextField types added, kernel hybridSearch result shape changed (no prior consumers — was throwing), asOf added as optional param (backward compatible). All changes additive at the consumer level.

stages.label: pnpm publish -r --filter='./packages/*' --access public
stages.note: OTP browser flow completed by user; all 5 packages live

lanes.label: v0.2.1 — Query-zone facades + FTS5 input cap publish
lanes.semver_rationale: Patch bump — code-additive only, no contract changes. Three thin kernel facades (query.getNeighbors, query.listContradictions, query.listInsights) over StructuredStore provider methods that already shipped in v0.2.0. Plus a defensive 10 KB input cap on buildFtsQuery in arcana-provider-libsql.

stages.label: pnpm publish -r --filter='./packages/*' --access public
stages.note: OTP browser flow completed by user; all 5 packages live

lanes.label: v0.3.0 — Parity harness publish
lanes.semver_rationale: Minor bump — new public API export at @kybernesis/arcana-testkit/parity. No existing contract changes; pure additive surface.

stages.label: pnpm publish -r --filter='./packages/*' --access public
stages.note: OTP browser flow completed by user; all 5 packages live

lanes.label: v0.4.0 — hybridSearch rebase per ADR 011 (port-first)
lanes.semver_rationale: Minor bump. hybridSearch internal logic rebased to KyberBot's 4-channel topology; matchType vocab restored to KB-faithful values ('graph'|'multi' removed, 'both' restored); graphHops/graphScore deprecated. Schema additions: Memory.createdAt required field; StructuredStore.listEntities contract method.

stages.label: pnpm publish -r --filter='./packages/*' --access public
stages.note: OTP browser flow completed by user; all 5 packages live

lanes.label: v0.4.1 — factRetrieval rebase per ADR 011 (2nd port-first application)
lanes.semver_rationale: Patch bump. Internal-logic only — factRetrieval rebased to KB's 4-layer flow (direct FTS → entity expansion → 1-hop graph → bridge). No contract changes.

stages.label: pnpm publish -r --filter='./packages/*' --access public
stages.note: OTP completed by user; all 5 packages live

lanes.label: v0.5.0 — New package arcana-provider-llm-claude-code + 5-pkg version-align bump
lanes.semver_rationale: Minor bump. New public API package (additive). Existing 5 packages bump 0.4.1 → 0.5.0 for workspace coherence; no contract changes to existing packages.

stages.label: Bump all 6 packages to 0.5.0 (5 existing + 1 new)
publish.yml: for each pkg in dep order, npm view → skip or publish
Re-run on same tag is no-op
